overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 featuring Geralt exploring a medieval riverside tavern at night during a rainstorm. The character moves from the warm candlelit interior to a rain-soaked wooden balcony overlooking a river, then crosses an ancient stone bridge while holding a torch.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval tavern interior with candlelight and fireplace

agents.ego_description: walking through the candlelit tavern holding a torch, observing the rustic interior and NPCs

notable_agents.action: woman in traditional dress standing near wooden table with candles

entered.detail: large stone fireplace with burning fire and wooden mantle
rustic wooden tables with candles and food items
exposed dark wooden ceiling beams supporting the roof
open doorway revealing blue night sky and rain outside

segments.scene_description: Geralt explores the interior of a rustic medieval tavern, illuminated by warm candlelight and a crackling fireplace. The wooden interior features exposed beams and simple furniture, with a few villagers standing about as the character moves through the space holding a torch.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden balcony walkway overlooking river and stone bridge

events.description: exits the tavern onto a wooden balcony exposed to rain and night air
rain becomes visibly heavier as the character moves along the exposed balcony

agents.ego_description: walking along the rain-soaked wooden balcony, holding a torch to illuminate the river view and distant stone bridge

notable_agents.action: man leaning against the tavern exterior wall near the doorway

entered.detail: weathered wooden railing along the balcony edge overlooking the river
large stone arch bridge spanning the river in the distance
dark flowing river visible below the balcony
exterior wooden walls of the tavern covered in green ivy

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to the rain-swept wooden balcony outside the tavern, offering a view of a stone bridge arching over a dark river. The torchlight flickers against the wet wooden railings as rain falls steadily, and the character walks along the exterior walkway observing the night landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient stone bridge crossing over river

events.description: briefly re-enters the tavern before exiting to the covered porch area
steps from the wooden porch onto the cobblestone surface of the stone bridge
passes other pedestrians while continuing to walk across the bridge

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the stone bridge, passing other travelers and guards while holding a torch in the rain

notable_agents.action: two villagers walking ahead on the bridge toward the far shore
armed guard standing watch near the bridge railing

entered.detail: cobblestone walking surface of the bridge with weathered stones
wooden railings lining both sides of the stone bridge
wooden covered porch area at the bridge entrance with support beams

segments.scene_description: After briefly returning inside, Geralt exits to a covered porch and steps onto the ancient stone bridge. The cobblestone path stretches ahead with wooden railings on either side, while other villagers and a guard are visible walking or standing on the bridge. The rain continues to fall as the character makes his way across the span toward the distant village.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the warm, sheltered interior of a medieval tavern out into a rain-drenched nocturnal landscape. It begins inside the rustic tavern, moving through a space of exposed beams and flickering candlelight where villagers gather near a crackling fireplace. As the camera follows the character outward, the scene shifts to a rain-swept wooden balcony where the warm interior light is replaced by the flicker of a torch against wet railings and a view of a dark river. The perspective then moves briefly back through the shelter before stepping out onto an ancient stone bridge, where the environment opens up into a wide, cobblestone span. Finally, the camera advances across the bridge amidst falling rain, passing guards and villagers while heading toward a distant village.
